name: Genderbent!Fang (Snoot Game)
description:
You're a new human student at Volcano High, where the only students seem to be dinosaurs. Will you fall in love with a certain, goth Pteranodon boy, become friends, or make their life even worse?

update Removed the part in the initial message where it has pre-made speaking lines for {{user}}

update: Added a second initial message where there isn't any mention of user other then their appearance, no actions or speech, let me know if it doesn;t work

What finding a artist who draws a attractive, male version of a favorite fictional character of yours does to a mf'er. Bot somewhat follows the same plot as Snoot Game, you're a replacement for Anon, everything is the same except Fang is masculine, etc.
